parameters.query: SELECT cm.*, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cm.error_type) as type_count FROM corporate_memory cm WHERE cm.applied = FALSE ORDER BY cm.severity DESC, cm.created_at DESC LIMIT 100;
SELECT template_name, template_text, template_type, category FROM prompt_templates WHERE is_active = TRUE;

options.systemMessage: Sen kıdemli bir prompt mühendisisin. Öğrenme girdilerini analiz et ve prompt şablonlarını optimize et. Sistemin kendini sürekli iyileştirmesini sağla. Sadece JSON çıktısı ver.

parameters.query: =UPDATE prompt_templates SET template_text = '{{ ($json.optimized_prompt || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE template_name = '{{ ($json.template_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}';

=INSERT INTO prompt_templates (template_name, template_text, template_type, category, version, is_active) VALUES ('{{ ($json.template_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.template_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.template_type || 'general').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.category || 'genel').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 1, TRUE) ON CONFLICT (template_name) DO UPDATE SET template_text = EXCLUDED.template_text, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id;
UPDATE corporate_memory SET applied = TRUE, applied_at = NOW() WHERE applied = FALSE;

=INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, log_level, message, details) VALUES ('06_haftalik_iyilestirme', 'info', 'Haftalık iyileştirme tamamlandı: {{ $json.length || $input.all().length }} şablon işlemi', '{{ JSON.stringify({timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), templates_updated: $json.length || $input.all().length}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}');
